news_items.summary: Keeping track of the 40-man roster, one roster move at a time.

news_items.headline: Dodgers 2026 injured list tracker
news_items.summary: This is your one-stop shop for every Dodgers stint on the injured list during the 2026 season. We’ll also include every time a player misses time on the paternity list, bereavement leave, or is on the family medical emergency list as well. Basically any time a player misses time that requires a roster move, we’ll […]

news_items.headline: Dodgers vs. Angels game III chat
news_items.summary: The Dodgers look to sweep the Angels on Sunday. Roki Sasaki faces Grayson Rodriguez. SUNDAY GAME INFO

news_items.headline: Dodgers trade for Lauer, who faced them in World Series last year
Dodgers trade for Eric Lauer
news_items.summary: With Blake Snell having elbow surgery on Tuesday, Tyler Glasnow on the injured list with back spasms, and River Ryan only one start back from a minor league injured list stint, the Dodgers had five starting pitchers for their six-man rotation. So it makes perfect sense that they acquired left-hander Eric Lauer from the Toronto […]

Mets pitching prospect Jack Wenninger pulled after 2.1 innings in latest Triple-A outing
news_items.summary: Mets pitching prospect Jack Wenninger lasted just 2.1 innings in Sunday's game for Triple-A Syracuse, getting pulled after 61 pitches.

news_items.headline: Jose Altuve believed to have an oblique injury, says Astros GM Dana Brown
news_items.summary: Altuve could join a crowded Astros injured list that already includes shortstop Jeremy Peña, outfielder Jake Meyers, starting pitcher Hunter Brown, closer Josh Hader and third baseman Carlos Correa.
